title: Brazilian Chicken Fritters
description: Crispy fried chicken fritters with a rich Brazilian twist, perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine chicken pieces, flour, eggs, Parmesan cheese, onion, and garlic. Mix well.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Remove the chicken mixture from the refrigerator and let it sit at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
Dredge the patties in panko breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Carefully place the fritters in the hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the Brazilian Chicken Fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
